title: T-19 "star burner"
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Burner}}
'''T-19 "star burners"''' were fast [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]]. Three could be placed on a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]''
